message:
fix: resolve 3 bugs in ft status, ft doctor, and distributed agent config

- #35: Add fast read-only check for distributed panes before loading.
  Opens DB read-only (no WAL recovery) and runs COUNT query. Skips
  expensive StorageHandle creation when no distributed panes exist.

- #36: Add --connect-addr CLI flag to decouple agent connect target
  from distributed.bind_addr (which is the server-side listener).
  Priority: --connect > --connect-addr > distributed.bind_addr.
  Fully backward compatible.

- #37: Replace manual text-based PID parsing in ft doctor with
  frankenterm_core::lock::check_running(), the same function used
  by ft stop and ft config apply-profile. Fixes false stale-lock
  warnings when watcher is actually running.

Closes #35, Closes #36, Closes #37

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
